reason: Check RVV selected-body realization, typed body authority, and Stage 2 coverage rules for memory movement.
Check Common EmitC/export neutrality and provider-owned route payload mirror contract.
Check focused lit/C++/generated-bundle/ssh rvv evidence requirements for RVV claims.
Check capability/profile facts constrain legality without becoming RVV route authority.
Check strided memory route logic remains RVV plugin-local and does not move semantics into common code.
Check selected bodies explicitly import runtime ABI values and remain low-level RVV execution bodies.
Previous completed route foundation and recorded full-suite strided memory fixture failures.

summary: Created bounded PRD for Stage2 RVV strided memory selected-body route repair/foundation. Focused reproduction shows the two known failures are target header FileCheck order drift while provider/emission-plan/header output already carry strided memory layout and stride-source mirrors. Production target validation has existing C++ fail-closed coverage for base memory route-family plan, provider support mirror, runtime ABI order, source/destination memory form, source stride mirror, route operand binding, header/type facts, and stale non-base residue.

Production provider/target support was already real for base strided memory movement. Repaired the two failing pre-realized strided memory target fixtures by making header metadata checks order-insensitive and adding target-export fail-closed mutations for runtime ABI order, route operand binding, provider support mirror, strided memory layout, and source/destination stride source.
